# AI Workflow Best Practices

> Proven patterns for effective AI-assisted development workflows, prompting strategies, and testing approaches.

## Entries

- [Plan in One Session, Execute in Another](plan-then-execute.md): Separate planning from implementation to maximize context for each. FOUNDATIONAL.
- [Structured Prompting for AI Coding Assistants](structured-prompting.md): Specific, scoped, actionable instructions -- not generic advice the model already knows. RECOMMENDED.
- [Test-Driven Development with AI Assistants](tdd-with-ai.md): Write tests first to constrain AI output and verify correctness immediately. RECOMMENDED.
